tooling.build: scons addon (one-command redistributable); scons platform=android target=template_release; ./gradlew :plugin:assembleRelease
tooling.test: ./gradlew test (Kotlin unit, JUnit+MockK+FakeMwaClient); scons tests (C++ host, GoogleTest+MockMwaAndroidBridge); GUT for GDScript; ./gradlew connectedAndroidTest (instrumented, macos-latest + emulator + Fake Wallet)
tooling.security: CI grep for Log.*(authToken|publicKey|SecretString.value); merged-manifest CI audit; dependency-verification.xml + gradle.lockfile; reproducible-build 2-runner byte-diff; release R8 smoke
